settings.title: HELIUS Study: 2,084 subjects, 6 ethnic groups
settings.text: Biology — not diet, age, or lifestyle — is the strongest predictor of gut microbiome composition.

settings.title: Microbiome shifts within one generation
settings.text: Immigration and environmental changes cause ancestral microbiome depletion — replacing diverse bacteria with Western strains.
settings.source: Vangay et al., 2018 — Cell Host & Microbe

settings.title: Most probiotics don't survive stomach acid
settings.text: Without acid-protection delivery, up to 96% of probiotic bacteria die before reaching the gut. MAKTREK Bi-Pass solves this.
settings.source: Govender et al., 2014 — Journal of Functional Foods

settings.heading: Your biology isn't one-size-fits-all.
settings.text: At BaseCode Health, we build supplements informed by biological diversity research. The supplement industry ignores the fact that everyone's biology is different. We don't. Origin is our first product — and it won't be the last.

settings.quote: Finally, a supplement that considers my biology. I noticed a difference within the first week.
settings.author: Priya S.

settings.quote: I've tried every probiotic out there. Origin is the first one that actually works for my body.
settings.author: Marcus T.
